sessions.summary: User reviewed their monthly finances after salary credit and planned savings strategies for November, focusing on reducing food delivery spend and setting aside money for a house fund.
commitments: Cut food delivery spend in half to approximately ₹6,445 this month
Transfer ₹30,000 to house fund on November 25th
insights: User has a goal of saving ₹15 lakh in 2 years, requiring approximately ₹62,500/month in savings
Food delivery (Swiggy/Zomato) was the single largest discretionary expense last month at ₹12,890 across 8 orders
User has a house fund as a named savings goal
Fixed monthly outflows total ₹46,500 (rent ₹25,000, SIP ₹10,000, internet + mobile ₹3,500, credit card auto-debit ₹8,000)
